phrases.intent_en: Ask about the character of the neighborhood
phrases.text_local: Quelle est l'atmosphère du quartier de la Vieille Ville ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel eh lah-tos-FAIR doo kar-TYAY duh lah VYAY VEEL
phrases.cultural_note: The Vieille Ville is Geneva's historic hilltop heart, with cobblestone streets, medieval buildings, antique dealers, art galleries and pavement cafés.

responses.english: Go up the hill, it's right up there.
responses.phonetic: OO suh TROOV lah kah-tay-DRAHL sa(n) PYAYR
responses.local: Montez la colline, c'est juste là-haut.

phrases.intent_en: Ask for a café recommendation in the neighborhood
phrases.text_local: Pouvez-vous me recommander un café sympa dans le quartier ?
phrases.pronunciation: poo-VAY-voo muh ruh-koh-mohn-DAY un kah-FAY sam-PAH don luh kar-TYAY
phrases.cultural_note: The Grand-Rue and the Place du Bourg-de-Four are the social hub of the Vieille Ville — the latter is Geneva's oldest square and still has working fountains.

responses.english: Yes, the Café de la Paix just around the corner.
responses.phonetic: bawn-ZHOOR poo-VAY voo muh ruh-kuh-mawn-DAY uhn, uhn ka-FAY sa(n)-PAH daw(n) luh kar-TYAY
responses.local: Oui, le Café de la Paix juste au coin.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if the neighborhood is safe at night
phrases.text_local: Le quartier est-il sûr le soir ?
phrases.pronunciation: luh kar-TYAY eh-TEEL SOOR luh SWAR
phrases.cultural_note: Geneva is consistently ranked one of the world's safest cities. The Vieille Ville is quiet and pleasant at night, with a handful of bars around the Place du Bourg-de-Four.

responses.english: They are located right on the street corner, next to the pharmacy. It's about a two-minute walk.
responses.phonetic: OO sohn lay TWA-let pyoo-BLEEK lay plew PROSH
responses.local: Elles se trouvent juste au coin de la rue, à côté de la pharmacie. C'est à environ deux minutes à pied.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the antique market on the weekend
phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il un marché aux antiquités dans ce quartier le week-end ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee-ah-TEEL un mar-SHAY oh zon-tee-kee-TAY don suh kar-TYAY luh WEEK-end
phrases.cultural_note: A small antique market is held on the Place de la Fusterie on Thursdays and Saturdays; the Place du Bourg-de-Four also hosts occasional fairs.

responses.phonetic: ee-GREK ah tay eel uhn / uhn ah-sahn-SUR poor day-SAHNDR ah(n) VEEL
responses.local: Oui, près des escaliers de la Corraterie.
